_about: Source of truth for /services/[slug]/ pages. Consumed by scripts/build-service-pages.mjs which emits index.html per slug. Owner edits this file, runs the build script, page output regenerates.

standard.title: Standard House Cleaning Atlanta GA | Red Sky Cleaning
standard.metaDescription: Standard house cleaning in Atlanta — routine upkeep with detailed dust, sanitize, vacuum, and mop. From $100. Background-checked, insured.
standard.lede: Routine upkeep that keeps a maintained Atlanta home maintained. Dust, sanitize, vacuum, mop — every visit, with the same crew, on the same checklist.
standard.schemaDescription: Routine house cleaning service for the greater Atlanta area: detailed dusting, kitchen sanitize, bathroom freshen, vacuum and mop.

items: Restock if guest soap/towels in place

notIncluded: Inside oven, fridge, or cabinets (add as add-on)

faqs.q: How often should I book a standard clean?
faqs.a: Most Atlanta customers run bi-weekly — it keeps the house even and saves 15% off the one-time rate. Weekly is the sweet spot for families with kids or pets and saves 20%.

faqs.q: Do I need to be home?
faqs.a: No. Most customers leave a key, garage code, or lockbox. We always confirm arrival and departure with a photo of the finished home.

faqs.q: What if a room is messier than usual?
faqs.a: We text you. If a one-time deep clean is the better fit for that visit, we'll quote it before starting work — never a surprise charge.

deep.title: Deep House Cleaning Atlanta GA | Red Sky Cleaning
deep.metaDescription: Deep house cleaning in Atlanta — top-to-bottom detail including baseboards, trim, appliance exteriors, and detailed bathroom scrub. From $250.
deep.lede: First-time clean? Long-overdue clean? Pre-event clean? This is the one. Top-to-bottom detail — baseboards, trim, appliance exteriors, the deep bathroom scrub.
deep.schemaDescription: Detailed top-to-bottom house cleaning in Atlanta including baseboards, trim, appliance exteriors, and detailed bathroom and kitchen scrub.
notIncluded: Inside oven or inside fridge (add as add-on or pick move-in/out)

faqs.q: Do I need a deep clean for my first visit?
faqs.a: Most first-time customers do — it gets the house to a baseline that standard cleans can then maintain. If your home is already maintained, you can skip straight to standard and save.
In humid Atlanta summers, every 3–6 months is reasonable. Customers on bi-weekly standard service usually deep-clean once or twice a year for refresh.

faqs.q: What's the difference between deep and move-in cleaning?
faqs.a: Deep cleans an occupied home. Move-in cleans an empty home and includes inside cabinets, fridge, oven — places we can't safely deep-clean while you're living there.

move-in.title: Move-In Cleaning Atlanta GA | Red Sky Cleaning
move-in.metaDescription: Move-in cleaning in Atlanta GA — spotless start before your boxes arrive. Inside cabinets, every floor, every fixture. From $250. Background-checked.
move-in.lede: Walk into a home that smells new. We clean every cabinet interior, every floor, every fixture — before your first box hits the kitchen counter.
move-in.schemaDescription: Move-in cleaning service in Atlanta for empty homes: inside cabinets, drawers, fridge, oven, every floor and fixture.

items: Sanitize every light switch + door handle

notIncluded: Carpet shampoo / steam (recommend separate carpet service)

faqs.q: When should I schedule the clean?
faqs.a: After the previous occupants are out, before your movers arrive. Typically the day before move-in, or the day of, before furniture comes in.
Yes — completely. We can't safely clean inside cabinets and around floors with boxes or furniture in the way. If anything's left behind, we hand-clean around it.
Yes. Our move-in pricing scales by square footage so a one-bedroom is much less than a 3,000 sq ft house.

move-out.title: Move-Out Cleaning Atlanta GA | Red Sky Cleaning
move-out.metaDescription: Move-out cleaning in Atlanta — inspection-ready, security-deposit-grade. Inside fridge + oven, cabinet wipe-down, every fixture. From $250.
move-out.lede: Get your security deposit back. Or hand the keys to a buyer who can't find a single thing to complain about. Either way: every inch, every fixture, every cabinet.
move-out.schemaDescription: Move-out cleaning service in Atlanta for empty homes: inspection-ready clean with inside fridge, oven, cabinets, and detailed fixtures for security-deposit return or sale.

items: Inside + outside vanity, drawers, medicine cabinet
Inside + outside closets (every shelf, every rod)
Empty + wipe inside any built-in storage
Inspect for missed items + final walk-through

notIncluded: Carpet shampoo / steam (separate carpet service if needed)

faqs.q: Will this satisfy my landlord's security-deposit checklist?
faqs.a: Most yes — our move-out checklist mirrors what Atlanta-area landlords inspect. Send your move-out checklist before the visit and we'll cross-check it.
After all your stuff is out, before your final walk-through. We can usually book the day-of or day-before with 48 hours' notice.

faqs.q: What if my landlord's still not satisfied?
faqs.a: We come back within 24 hours and re-clean whatever they flagged at no additional charge — that's our re-clean guarantee.

recurring.title: Recurring Cleaning Plans Atlanta | Save up to 20% | Red Sky Cleaning
recurring.metaDescription: Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleaning plans in Atlanta — save up to 20%. Same crew every visit. No contract, cancel any time. Background-checked, insured.
recurring.lede: Same crew, same checklist, every visit — and you save more the more often we come. No contract. Cancel any time.
recurring.schemaDescription: Recurring cleaning subscription plans in Atlanta — weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly — with discounts up to 20% off the one-time rate.

faqs.q: Do I have to sign a contract?
faqs.a: No. There's no contract, no cancellation fee, and no minimum number of visits. Skip a week or cancel entirely whenever you want.
Yes — move from weekly to bi-weekly or monthly at any time. The new rate kicks in on your next visit.

faqs.q: Will I get the same cleaner every time?
faqs.a: We aim for the same crew on every recurring visit. If your usual cleaner is out, we send someone trained to your home's checklist with a heads-up text.

faqs.q: What if I need to skip a week?
faqs.a: Just text or email us 24 hours ahead. No fee. Your discount carries over to the next visit.
